understanding.goal_understanding: Place every selectable piece onto a goal tile (marked '+') in each level, simultaneously if multiple goals exist, to clear the level. Advance through all levels with limited steps per level to win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) attempt to shift the currently selected piece by 3-pixel grid increments. If an adjacent object is pushable, it may be pushed. Walls and boundaries can block movement, but some are passable under certain interactions. The 'movement.{direction}_blocked' hints are heuristic, not absolute. CLICK action with a target position in pixel coordinates switches control to another selectable piece at that location. The grid uses 3 pixels per cell, and positions are pixel coordinates.
